entry.title: IDC 15F06719D0003691 (P00001) awarded to BRASFIELD & GORRIE, L.L.C., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: REGIONAL MULTIPLE AWARD CONSTRUCTION CONTRACT REGION 1, TOTAL CEILING NOT TO EXCEED $2B OVER LIFE OF CONTRACT BASE + 4OY. MOD P00001: EXERCISE OPTION YEAR 1.
